goal: Fix workerctl criteria-plan extraction quality for multi-line worker criteria prose, preserving read-only behavior and tests.

acceptance_criteria: Current-task acceptance criteria are recorded before completion and deferred follow-ups are separated with rationale.
criteria-plan correctly preserves multi-line bullet criteria under current-task and follow-up headings.
criteria-plan remains read-only and does not mutate acceptance_criteria, events, or commands.
Focused and full unit tests pass, or any test limitation is recorded with exact output.
guidelines: Do not merge PRs, do not switch away from branch dogfood-criteria-plan-multiline, and do not perform destructive cleanup.
When criteria are proposed, use criteria-plan as a draft only; record reviewed accepted/deferred criteria manually if needed.
Nudge only when durable state shows the worker is blocked, stale, missing criteria, or needs a concrete next action.
manager_config.objective: Manage the worker through a low-risk meaningful branch-scoped fix for criteria-plan multi-line criteria extraction. Ensure emergent acceptance criteria are recorded before accepting completion, and require proof from tests and replay/export before finish.

name: dogfood-criteria-plan-multiline
summary: Low-risk meaningful dogfood task after Gate 5: improve criteria-plan parsing for multi-line bullet/prose criteria.
